name: Scope Guard
description: Before write operations, verify the change respects ecosystem boundaries and canon rules.

then.prompt: Before writing, verify: 1) This change belongs to the current active spec or task. 2) It does not create a new repo or Vercel project. 3) It does not require paid AI keys (OpenAI/Anthropic) for core functionality. 4) It does not invent fake social/order links. 5) It does not delete canon data from data/. 6) It does not rename locked districts or characters. 7) It does not redesign unrelated pages. 8) Public brand is MysterMyself (not MysteryCartel on public UI). 9) TCU MASTER LAW preserved: No Sweep. No Shift. No Trade. If all checks pass, proceed with the write.
